title: OutputWorkflowContract
description: Input/output contract for the output workflow stage. The stage receives approved artifacts and produces a finalized run summary ready for human approval and optional publishing.

input.description: Input to the output stage: the brief, final script, and approved review report. The review_report verdict must be approved before this stage runs.

output.description: Finalized run output record. Written to publish-job.json and used as the basis for operator review and approval.

run_id.description: ID of the run this output belongs to.

status.description: Output readiness status. ready: all artifacts are present and review passed. needs_revision: review returned needs_revision. rejected: review returned rejected.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of the run result, suitable for display in the operator UI.

artifacts.description: List of artifacts produced by this run and available for operator review. Empty if the run did not complete successfully.

name.description: Human-readable name of the artifact (e.g. Content Brief, Script, Review Report).

path.description: Relative path to the artifact file under runs/artifacts/{run_id}/ (e.g. brief.json, script.json).

type.description: Artifact type category (e.g. brief, script, research, review, media).

next_actions.description: Recommended actions for the operator or pipeline to take next. Empty if status is ready and no further actions are required.

action.description: Description of the action to take (e.g. revise script pacing, add missing citation).

target_stage.description: Pipeline stage that should handle this action (e.g. script, research, review).
